shortTerm.title: Mars trine natal Sun
shortTerm.interpretation: Raw energy floods your system. You feel unstoppable — and in many ways, you are. Physical stamina is at its peak, ambitions feel achievable, and leadership comes naturally. Use this window to initiate rather than react.

shortTerm.title: Venus sextile natal Moon
shortTerm.interpretation: Emotional harmony wraps around your heart like a warm blanket. Relationships feel easy, creativity flows, and a general sense of contentment colors your daily experiences. A perfect time for expressing affection.

shortTerm.title: Mercury conjunct natal Jupiter
shortTerm.interpretation: Your mind expands beyond its usual horizons. Big ideas, philosophical conversations, and fortunate communications characterize this brief but powerful alignment. Write down everything — genius visits today.

shortTerm.title: Sun square natal Mars
shortTerm.interpretation: Friction generates fire. You may encounter resistance from external forces or find your own impatience getting in the way. Channel this combustible energy into physical exercise or assertive (not aggressive) action.

longTerm.title: Saturn conjunct natal Ascendant
longTerm.interpretation: A defining chapter of your life unfolds over these months. Saturn asks you to shed outdated self-concepts and build your identity on bedrock rather than sand. The work is demanding, but what emerges is a version of you that can withstand anything.

longTerm.title: Uranus trine natal Venus
longTerm.interpretation: Love and values are being delightfully disrupted. You're drawn to unconventional connections, fresh creative directions, and relationships that honor your authentic self. Freedom and intimacy are no longer contradictions in your world.

longTerm.title: Neptune sextile natal Mercury
longTerm.interpretation: Imagination dissolves the boundary between the ordinary and the extraordinary. Your thinking takes on a poetic, visionary quality. Inspired writing, music, and spiritual inquiry are all favored during this long, gentle transit.

eventOfDay.title: Sun enters Pisces
eventOfDay.description: The Sun's passage into Pisces dissolves boundaries and heightens collective sensitivity. For the next month, the cosmos emphasizes compassion, spiritual seeking, and creative imagination. Dreams carry messages worth decoding.
